---
title: "Interview with Anne-Laure Boulesteix"
date: 2022-03-18
subtitle: "Open Science Practices help to reduce the probability of false results"
categories: ["Interviews"]

template: templates/news-template.html
filters:
  - templates/process-news-yaml.lua
---


<p> In this interview, Prof. Dr. Anne-Laure Boulesteix, one of our members, is interviewed by Dr. Doreen Siegfried from the Leibniz Information Center for Economics. She talks about statistics and her own experiences with Open Science.</p>
<p><a href="https://open-science-future.zbw.eu/open-science-prinzipien-helfen-falsche-ergebnisse-zu-reduzieren/">Read the whole interview</a></p>
<div class="g-clear"></div>
